rules.source:
Int[(b_.*csc[c_.+d_.*x_])^n_,x_Symbol] :=
  -b*Cos[c+d*x]*(b*Csc[c+d*x])^(n-1)/(d*(n-1)) + 
  b^2*(n-2)/(n-1) \[Star] Int[(b*Csc[c+d*x])^(n-2),x] /;
FreeQ[{b,c,d},x] && GtQ[n,1] && IntegerQ[2*n]

Int[(b_.*csc[c_.+d_.*x_])^n_,x_Symbol] :=
  Cos[c+d*x]*(b*Csc[c+d*x])^(n+1)/(b*d*n) + 
  (n+1)/(b^2*n) \[Star] Int[(b*Csc[c+d*x])^(n+2),x] /;
FreeQ[{b,c,d},x] && LtQ[n,-1] && IntegerQ[2*n]

(* CE cofunction of #5: Rubi generates the (b*sec)^n analog at load *)
Int[(b_.*sec[c_.+d_.*x_])^n_,x_Symbol] :=
  (b*Sec[c+d*x])^n*Cos[c+d*x]^n \[Star] Int[1/Cos[c+d*x]^n,x] /;
FreeQ[{b,c,d},x] && EqQ[n^2,1/4]

(* CE sec cofunction of #2 (verified vs Rubi Int[Sec^(5/2)]) *)
Int[(b_.*sec[c_.+d_.*x_])^n_,x_Symbol] :=
  b*Sin[c+d*x]*(b*Sec[c+d*x])^(n-1)/(d*(n-1)) +
  b^2*(n-2)/(n-1) \[Star] Int[(b*Sec[c+d*x])^(n-2),x] /;
FreeQ[{b,c,d},x] && GtQ[n,1] && IntegerQ[2*n]

(* CE sec cofunction of #3 (verified vs Rubi Int[Sec^(-3/2)]) *)
Int[(b_.*sec[c_.+d_.*x_])^n_,x_Symbol] :=
  -Sin[c+d*x]*(b*Sec[c+d*x])^(n+1)/(b*d*n) +
  (n+1)/(b^2*n) \[Star] Int[(b*Sec[c+d*x])^(n+2),x] /;
FreeQ[{b,c,d},x] && LtQ[n,-1] && IntegerQ[2*n]

Int[(a_+b_.*csc[c_.+d_.*x_])^n_,x_Symbol] :=
  -b^2*Cot[c+d*x]*(a+b*Csc[c+d*x])^(n-2)/(d*(n-1)) + 
  a/(n-1) \[Star] Int[(a+b*Csc[c+d*x])^(n-2)*(a*(n-1)+b*(3*n-4)*Csc[c+d*x]),x] /;
FreeQ[{a,b,c,d},x] && EqQ[a^2-b^2,0] && GtQ[n,1] && IntegerQ[2*n]
